{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of the Silver Heart
| aliases = Sage of Silver Heart
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|fade into shadow}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, weaving space and shadow to create portals}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sage of the Silver Heart]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura clan|Akura family]], [[Akura clan]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Sage of the Silver Heart Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Charity]], known as the [[Sage]] of the [[Silver Heart]], is a powerful figure who serves as the mistress of her castle and acts as the official representative for the [[Akura]] family, the humanity at large, and her grandmother. As an [[Archlady]] at the peak of the [[Lord realm]], she possesses a unique status that distinguishes her from other Archlords. Her abilities involve a connection to a greater concept of reality through an [[Icon]], and she utilizes the [[Book of the Silver Heart]], which contains seven specific techniques related to dreams and shadow. She is noted for her exceptional emotional control and cold logic, though she can experience moments of internal struggle. Her presence is often accompanied by a silver and purple scale or an apparition resembling a massive book with a central eye. In combat or influence, she has demonstrated the ability to manipulate minds and possesses significant authority when communicating with leaders like [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. She is also a skilled craftswoman, having created both swords and a goldsteel statue.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sage of the Silver Heart]] is a title held by [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sage]] of [[Silver Heart]] is a woman with deep purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sage]] of [[Silver Heart]] looks less than twenty years old.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Charity]] is the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A female [[Sage]] and member of the [[Akura]] family, the [[Sage]] of the [[Silver Heart]] eventually took hostile notice of Kiro. Though she possesses the ability to fade into shadow, she has notably restricted bloodshed. Furthermore, she would be unhappy with Daji for the killing of an [[Akura clan]] member.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] is a member of the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] is a female [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] had taken hostile notice of Kiro.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] has restricted bloodshed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] is a character who can fade into shadow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] would be unhappy with Daji for killing an [[Akura clan]] member.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] selected [[Lindon]] to represent the [[Akura]] family in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage]] of [[Silver Heart]]'s technique caused the unnatural terror.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] is capable of weaving space and shadow to create portals.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Cracks are spreading within the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
